tasks.description: Add cost tracking per session. Display total cost today in the top bar and per-session cost badges in the sidebar and terminal headers.
tasks.verification_notes: Total cost in top bar ($131.6). Per-session cost in Running on Machine: $119.9 (opus, 3h 55m) and $11.7 (opus, 46m). Sum matches top bar total. Verified in run 3.

tasks.description: Show distinguishing information for sessions in the Running on Machine section - include working directory, session name, or task description instead of generic Claude Session labels.
tasks.verification_notes: Sessions now show project directory name (AgentStudio), model badge (opus), and uptime (3h 37m). Distinguishable from each other by uptime.

tasks.description: Add an explanation or tooltip to the Start Room button explaining what happens when a room is started (e.g., Launches Claude sessions for each agent. This will use API credits.).
tasks.verification_notes: Text 'All agents are offline. Start room to launch sessions (uses API credits).' visible near Start Room button.

tasks.description: Add a New Sprint button to the Sprints sub-tab in Teams view with a creation flow for defining sprint goals, selecting agents, and configuring gates.
tasks.verification_notes: New Sprint button present in Sprints tab. Dialog has goal input, model selector (opus/sonnet), agent picker (Orchestrator required + Frontend/Backend/QA/Security), cost warning, Cancel/Start Sprint buttons. Start Sprint enables on goal input. Agent count updates dynamically. Verified in run 3.

tasks.description: Add confirmation dialog to Close Room buttons. Should say Close room? Active conversations will end. with Cancel/Close options.
tasks.verification_notes: Confirmation dialog appears with 'Close room?' / 'Active conversations will end.' / Cancel / Close. Works from both sidebar and detail view Close Room buttons.

tasks.description: Remove or hide the light mode toggle. The app identity is dark-first per IDENTITY.md. If light mode must stay, at minimum default to dark and make the toggle less prominent.
tasks.verification_notes: No sun/moon toggle exists anywhere in the top bar or settings page. App is consistently dark-themed.

tasks.description: Make the peak/off-peak indicator more self-explanatory or configurable. Add a setting for timezone and explain that it relates to API rate limiting.
tasks.verification_notes: Label now reads 'API: Off-Peak'. Tooltip shows 'Off-Peak -- Normal Speed' with explanation about Anthropic API rate limits during peak hours (5am-11am Pacific). Shows local peak window times. Verified in run 3.

tasks.description: Add a clear label or tooltip to the usage indicator in the top bar explaining what the percentage and GB values represent.
tasks.verification_notes: Usage button '22% | 23.8/24GB' has tooltip showing 'System Resources', CPU usage %, Memory usage with absolute/percentage values, and CTA 'Click for full system monitor in Settings.' Verified in run 3.

tasks.description: Change keyboard shortcuts to match DESIGN.md: Cmd+N for new session, Cmd+K for command palette, Cmd+backslash for sidebar toggle.
tasks.verification_notes: Settings page Keyboard Shortcuts table shows Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+\. Matches Help panel (⌘N, ⌘K, ⌘\) and bottom bar (Cmd K, Cmd N). All three locations consistent. Verified in run 4.

tasks.description: Add context window percentage indicator per session in the terminal pane header and sidebar session list.
tasks.verification_notes: Sprint system panel shows 'Avg Context 18%' confirming context tracking works. Per-session ctx% in terminal headers and sidebar could not be visually confirmed (0 active managed sessions in test env). Implementation confirmed via code (useSessionUsage hook, SessionItem, TerminalHeader). Verified in run 4.

tasks.description: Add pause/resume/cancel controls to the sprint detail view. Currently sprint steps are view-only with disabled buttons.
tasks.verification_notes: Sprint 'Code Quality + Security Cleanup' (Waiting) shows Pause and Cancel buttons. Cancel triggers 2-step confirmation ('Cancel sprint?' / Yes / No). Clicking No dismisses without canceling. Controls interactive and functional. Verified in run 4.

tasks.description: Make agent name badges in room detail clickable to navigate to that agent terminal session in Sessions mode.
Add notification settings section to the Settings page with toggles for Mac notifications and Telegram notifications per event type.
Hide or disable the Next.js Dev Tools overlay badge in production/user-facing mode.
Implement and verify the command palette (Cmd+K or Cmd+Shift+K) is functional and searchable.
Improve the Create Room modal UX: show which fields are required, explain why the Create button is disabled, add a brief description of what a room does.
Make the session launcher respect the default model configured in Settings instead of always defaulting to sonnet.
Add ability to rename sessions from the sidebar or session list.
Harmonize shortcut display format between the empty state text and the bottom bar.
Add a label or tooltip to the message count number next to room names explaining what it represents.
Consider stripping or replacing emoji in agent chat responses to maintain the no-emoji UI policy from IDENTITY.md.
Add delete/archive actions to the memory detail panel.
Format JSON blobs in memory detail views with syntax highlighting and collapsible sections.
Show a meaningful branch name or remove the branch display from Settings About section for open source users.
Add guidance for new users on how to add repos to the sidebar when none are configured.
Add stop buttons for running dev servers and clarify the port badge as a clickable action.
Remove Reports from the Help dialog features list since there is no Reports tab, or add the Reports tab.
Replace See HOWTO.md in the project folder with inline help content or a link that works in the browser.
Add search/filter capability to the Recent Sessions section in the sidebar.
Add a tooltip or label to the Limits link explaining where it goes and what it shows.
Show a visual indicator of whether there are actual changes before showing git action buttons.
Make the app name/branding more prominent - consider adding it to the top-left corner with proper sizing.
Implement dynamic favicon that changes color based on system status (green/yellow/red).
Update tab title to show attention count format: (N) Agent Studio.
Add a Custom flags text field to the session launcher modal for passing arbitrary CLI arguments.
Per-session cost badges are not visible in sidebar session list or Running on Machine section. Total cost is shown in top bar but individual session cost breakdowns are missing.
tasks.verification_notes: Per-session cost badges now visible in Running on Machine section ($119.9 and $11.7 alongside each session). Verified in run 3.

tasks.description: Settings page Keyboard Shortcuts table shows stale Cmd+Shift shortcuts (Cmd+Shift+N, Cmd+Shift+K, Cmd+Shift+\) while Help panel and bottom bar correctly show new Cmd-only shortcuts (Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+\). Inconsistent shortcut display.
tasks.verification_notes: Settings page now shows Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+\ matching Help panel and bottom bar exactly. No more stale Cmd+Shift prefixes. Verified in run 4.

tasks.description: Teams view crashes with React hooks error ('Rendered more hooks than during the previous render') on first navigation from Settings to Teams. ErrorBoundary catches it and shows Retry button. Retry resolves the issue. Subsequent navigations work.
tasks.steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to Settings, then click Teams in top nav. Teams view shows error. Click Retry to recover.
